Day - Constellation Complex 63
Taking the Vighati from the time of the day, one can apply
the relevant data to the second or third table.
(B) The next table follows Sri Raja Gopala Iyyer's method.
Birth Vighatis mnltiplied by 4 and divided by nine gives a
remainder. Add one to this and connt from Dhanishtha, Mri
gasira or Chitra to get the birth star. The starting point is the
weekday. The nakshatras are connted from Asvini to Revati.
The first Vighatis are given. Weekday is from Friday.
